/TWS/X AS TO COUNT 2, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCE TO 1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL WITH 20DAYS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED,/4019HALF/X:AS TO COUNT 3, THE SENTENCE IS ASFOLLOWS:/CH3:ISS:PROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 20D/CTS:20/WS/X:APD MAY EXAMINE AT ANYTIME ALL COMPUTERS, ELECTRONIC DEVICES, OR DIGITAL STORAGE DEVICES OWNED,POSSESSED OR UNDER THE DEFENDANT'S DOMINION AND CONTROL/DEF: SHALL REGISTER PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 290,006/DEF: SHALL STAY 150 YARDS AWAY FROM ANGELEE Y, (STAY AWAY PREVIOUSLY FILED)/SAORD1/SAORD2/DEF: AGREES TO PARTICIPATE IN A POLYGRAPH EXAMINATIONS IF REQUESTED AS PARTOF THE SEX OFFENDER MANAGEMENT PROGRAM AND WAIVE ANY PRIVILEGE AGAINST SELF-INCRIMINATION (PC 1203,067(B)(3))/DEF: SHALL ALSO COMPLY WITH THE AGREEMENT TO SPECIAL CONDITIONS OF PROBATION - SEX OFFENDERS, SIGNED AND DATED ON 09-28-16 BY HIM//CTORD: THE PROBATION COSTS UP TO AN AMOUNT OF $50 PER MONTH WAIVED/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/X:UPON RELEASE, DEFENDANT SHALL REPORT TO THE PROBATION DEPARTMENT,/REMA/OBEY/ACCEP/
